meta.note: Consolidated copilot results for both benchmark modes, organized to match the README 'Benchmark problems' table (8 sources, 483 proof-completion + 231 proof-from-scratch = 714 canonical tasks). The 98 transient-infra (0-token) failures were re-run (agent produced real proofs) and re-graded locally with a rebuilt check_proof_bin; real PASS/FAIL/CHEATING verdicts merged in (regraded=true). Non-canonical duplicates excluded; 0 tasks missing, 0 residual infra/ERROR/TIMEOUT.
